title: mesua nagassarium var. coromandeliana
intro: Mesua nagassarium var. coromandeliana, also known as the Coromandel ironwood or Coromandel tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Clusiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The Coromandel ironwood is used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
